Speaker 1: Honey, you gotta talk to her.
honey: I can’t! Y’know? You guys don’t know what it’s like to put yourself out there like that and just get shot down.
Boy: I don’t know what that’s like?! Up until I was 25 I thought the only response to, "I love you," was, "Oh crap!"
Speaker 1: Hello? No rejection? I got shot down at fat camp! Boy, kids are mean when they’re hungry.
honey: All right so, so what do I do?
Speaker 1: This is Rachel. I mean, what are you gonna do, never going to talk to her again? I mean I know it’s weird, it’s awkward, but you gotta at least try.
honey: Yeah. Okay.
